name: deploybot
description: Coordinate exact-head pull requests through verified deployment and thread notification

interface.shortDescription: Review and land pull requests safely.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates exact-head review, manual deploy authorization, burst merging, overlap handling, exact-main verification, and source-thread deployment receipts.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR and prepare it for the merge queue.
Deploy this PR through the agent merge queue.
Show me what is blocking the merge queue.
